finding_results.notes: The labor-yard sequence now changes Delroy's leverage at each pass: he is sorted out by age/language, then prices himself out of insult wages, then has the shoulder exposed publicly, then loses even a fitting drywall job because he cannot wait until Friday to be paid. Claude's name arrives immediately after the delayed-pay trap, tightening the turn into debt instead of repeating another flat rejection.

summary: Rebuilt the opener so the hiring encounters escalate through distinct consequences and funnel Delroy toward Claude's itemized advance with less repetitive waiting-state churn.
